chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Miscellaneous Appeal No.185 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing / Priority 1. For orders on office objections a/w reply. 2. For order on CMA No.10332 of 2023. 3. For order on CMA No.10333 of 2023. 4. For hearing of main case. 12.01.2026 Mr. Naeem Suleman, Advocate for the appellants. Ms. Afsheen Aman, Advocate for respondent No.6. Mr. Ziauddin Junejo, AAG Sindh. ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for the appellants has filed statement dated 12.01.2026 which is taken on record. As per the order dated 16.07.2025 passed by the Senior Civil Judge-V, Karachi, West, in Society Suit No.440 of 2023, the plaint has been returned to the respondent No.1 / plaintiff under Order VII Rule 10 CPC. Counsel contends that this appeal arising out of the said suit has become infructuous as the suit is no longer in existence. Accordingly, this miscellaneous appeal is dismissed in the above terms alongwith listed applications. J U D G E Asif
